/opt/local/scoulibaly/riscv-toolchain/lowrisc-toolchain-rv32imcb-20220210-1/bin/riscv32-unknown-elf-gcc -mtune=sifive-3-series -O3 -falign-functions=16 -funroll-all-loops -finline-functions -falign-jumps=4 -mstrict-align -g -nostartfiles -T "/home/scoulibaly/ibex-demo-system/sw/c/../common/link.ld" CMakeFiles/lcd_st7735.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/lcd_st7735.dir/lcd.c.obj CMakeFiles/lcd_st7735.dir/fractal_fixed.c.obj CMakeFiles/lcd_st7735.dir/fractal_float.c.obj CMakeFiles/lcd_st7735.dir/fractal_palette.c.obj CMakeFiles/lcd_st7735.dir/fbcon.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/demo_system.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/uart.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/timer.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/gpio.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/pwm.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/spi.c.obj ../../common/CMakeFiles/common.dir/crt0.S.obj -o lcd_st7735  liblcd_st7735_lib.a libcoremark.a
